channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM
item.description: Henry Nowak deserves legacy that goes beyond tragedy, says PM

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
item.description: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham says he would join Labour leadership contest - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham says he would join Labour leadership contest - ITVX

item.title: The Guardian: Business secretary attacks ‘entitlement’ of Starmer leadership rivals - The Guardian
item.description: Business secretary attacks ‘entitlement’ of Starmer leadership rivals - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham confirms he will run to replace Starmer as Prime Minister if he wins Makerfield by-election
item.description: Burnham confirms he will run to replace Starmer as Prime Minister if he wins Makerfield by-election

item.title: ITVX: Starmer: 'Difficult questions' over police handling of Henry Nowak's murder - ITVX
item.description: Starmer: 'Difficult questions' over police handling of Henry Nowak's murder - ITVX

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham confirms he will seek to replace Starmer as UK prime minister
item.description: Burnham confirms he will seek to replace Starmer as UK prime minister

item.title: Sky News Politics: Andy Burnham says for the first time that he would join Labour leadership contest
item.description: Andy Burnham says for the first time that he would join Labour leadership contest

item.title: i Politics: Burnham just set himself a trap by hinting at an income tax cut
item.description: Burnham just set himself a trap by hinting at an income tax cut

item.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: New Survation poll of Makerfield has Burnham 10 points up.
LAB: 49% (+6) REF: 39% (-1) RTR: 8% (+1) GRN: 2% (-1) LDEM: 1% (-3) CON: 1% (-1)
item.description:
New Survation poll of Makerfield has Burnham 10 points up.
LAB: 49% (+6) REF: 39% (-1) RTR: 8% (+1) GRN: 2% (-1) LDEM: 1% (-3) CON: 1% (-1)
